<style>
    #free-shipping-bar {
        background: #5b1fa5;
        color: #ffffff;
        padding: 8px 25px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        position: relative;
        right: 0;
        top: -3px;
        font-weight: 300;
        font-size: 1.4rem;
    }

    #free-shipping-bar.hidden {
        display: none;
    }

    .fsb-message {
        b {
            color: #ffdd7a;
        }
    }   

    .fsb-progress {
        flex: 1;
        background: #3c126c;
        height: 8px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        min-width: 150px;
    }

    .fsb-fill {
        display: block !important;
        background: #e5c267;
        height: 100%;
        width: 0%;
        border-radius: 20px;
        transition: width 0.3s ease;
    }

    .fsb-progress::after {
        content: "";
        width: 10px;
        height: 10px;
        background: white;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin-left: -5px;
    }
</style>

<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const bar = document.getElementById("free-shipping-bar");
        const msg = bar.querySelector(".fsb-message");
        const fill = bar.querySelector(".fsb-fill");

        const limit = 60 * 100; // 60 AUD/NZD in cents

        function updateBar() {
            fetch('/cart.js')
                .then(r => r.json())
                .then(cart => {
                    const subtotal = cart.total_price;
                    const remaining = limit - subtotal;

                    if (subtotal <= 0) {
                        bar.classList.remove("hidden");
                        msg.innerHTML = `Add <b>$60.00</b> for Free Shipping Australia Wide`;
                        fill.style.width = "0%";
                        return;
                    }

                    if (remaining > 0) {
                        bar.classList.remove("hidden");
                        msg.innerHTML = `Add <b>$${(remaining / 100).toFixed(2)}</b> for Free Shipping Australia Wide`;
                        let percent = (subtotal / limit) * 100;
                        if (percent > 100) percent = 100;
                        fill.style.width = percent + "%";
                    } else {
                        bar.classList.remove("hidden");
                        msg.innerHTML = `<b>You unlocked Free Shipping!</b>`;
                        fill.style.width = "100%";
                    }
                });
        }

        updateBar();

        const originalFetch = window.fetch;
        window.fetch = function () {
            return originalFetch.apply(this, arguments).then(res => {
                if (arguments[0].includes('/cart')) {
                    updateBar();
                }
                return res;
            });
        };
    });
</script></div><div id="shopify-section-sections--25683672629619__header" class="shopify-section shopify-section-group-header-group section-header shopify-section-header-sticky"><link rel="stylesheet" href="//www.bedbugwholesale.com.au/cdn/shop/t/2/assets/component-list-menu.css?v=151968516119678728991756881214" media="all" onload="this.media='all'">

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const shopLink =
            document.querySelector('a.mega-trigger-shop') ||
            document.querySelector('a[href="/collections/all-products"]');

        const megaMenu = document.querySelector('.mega-menu-shop');

        if (!shopLink || !megaMenu) {
            return;
        }

        const parent = shopLink.parentElement;

        parent.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'block';
        });

        parent.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = '';
        });

        megaMenu.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'block';
        });

        megaMenu.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = '';
        });
    });
</script>

<script>

    const resLink = document.querySelector('.mega-trigger-resources');
    const megaMenu = document.querySelector('.mega-menu-resources');

    if (resLink && megaMenu) {
        resLink.parentElement.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'block';

        resLink.parentElement.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'none';
        });

        megaMenu.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'block';
        });

        megaMenu.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            megaMenu.style.display = 'none';
        });
    }
});
</script>

<style>
/* ==============================
   Header Search – Desktop
================================ */

.header__search-form {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin: 0;
}

.header__search-field {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    background: #FBF7EE;
    border-radius: 9999px;
    padding: 14px;
    border: 1px solid #f3eee1;
}

.search__input {
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    background: transparent;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #998a69;
    min-width: 160px;
}

.search__input::placeholder {
    color: #998a69;
    opacity: 1;
}

.search__button {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.search__button .svg-wrapper {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    color: #6f4fa7;
}

/* ==============================
   Mobile Search Icon
================================ */

.header-search-icon {
    display: none;
    background: var(--light-sandle);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 50%;
    padding: 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.header-search-icon .svg-wrapper {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    color: #6f4fa7;
}

/* ==============================
   Search Modal
================================ */

.search-modal {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 999999;
    display: none;
}

.search-modal[aria-hidden="false"] {
    display: block;
}

.search-modal__overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}

.search-modal__content {
    position: relative;
    background: #fff;
    margin: 80px auto;
    padding: 30px;
    max-width: 90%;
    border-radius: 16px;
}

.search-modal__content input {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 14px;
    font-size: 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.search-modal__close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 5px;
    right: 5px;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

/* ==============================
   Responsive Switch
================================ */

@media (max-width: 960px) {
    .header__search-field {
        display: none;
    }

    .header-search-icon {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
    }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const openBtn = document.querySelector(".header-search-icon");
    const modal = document.getElementById("SearchModal");
    const closeBtn = modal.querySelector(".search-modal__close");
    const overlay = modal.querySelector(".search-modal__overlay");

    function openModal() {
        modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
    }

    function closeModal() {
        modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    }

    openBtn.addEventListener("click", openModal);
    closeBtn.addEventListener("click", closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener("click", closeModal);

    document.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
        if (e.key === "Escape") {
            closeModal();
        }
    });
});
</script>

    var form = root.querySelector("#product-form-template--25683672301939__main");
    var variantSelects = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(".variant-select"));
    var hiddenInput = root.querySelector("#product-variant-id-template--25683672301939__main");
    var priceEl = root.querySelector("#price-template--25683672301939__main");
    var compareEl = root.querySelector("#compare-template--25683672301939__main");
    var addBtn = root.querySelector(".btn-main");
    var oosEl = root.querySelector("#oos-template--25683672301939__main");
    var qtyInput = form.querySelector('input[name="quantity"]');

    

    var shopCurrency = "AUD";

    function formatMoney(cents) {
        return (cents / 100).toLocaleString('en-AU', {
            style: 'currency',
            currency: shopCurrency
        }) + " " + shopCurrency;
    }

    var selectedValues = new Array(productData.options.length).fill("");

    function allSelected() {
        return selectedValues.every(function (v) { return v && v.length > 0; });
    }

    function findVariantBySelected(values) {
        return productData.variants.find(function (v) {
            // Check if all selected option values match the variant's options
            return values.every((val, index) => val === v.options[index]);
        });
    }

    function applyVariant(variant) {
        if (!variant) return;

        hiddenInput.value = variant.id;
        priceEl.textContent = formatMoney(variant.price);

        var fromLabel = root.querySelector(".from-label");
        if (fromLabel) fromLabel.style.display = "none";

        if (variant.compare_at_price && variant.compare_at_price > variant.price) {
            compareEl.style.display = "inline-block";
            compareEl.textContent = formatMoney(variant.compare_at_price);
        } else {
            compareEl.style.display = "none";
            compareEl.textContent = "";
        }

        if (!variant.available) {
            addBtn.disabled = true;
            addBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", "true");
            addBtn.textContent = "Sold out";
            oosEl.style.display = "block";
        } else {
            addBtn.disabled = false;
            addBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", "false");
            addBtn.textContent = "Add to Cart";
            oosEl.style.display = "none";
        }
    }

    // Initialize default price state (kept for consistency)
    (function initPrice() {
        
    })();

    

    /**
     * Filters options in subsequent dropdowns based on selections made so far.
     * @param {number} startIndex - The index of the option group to start filtering from (usually the one *after* the change).
     */
    function filterOptions(startIndex) {
        // Iterate over option groups starting from startIndex
        for (let currentOptionIndex = startIndex; currentOptionIndex < productData.options.length; currentOptionIndex++) {
            const currentSelect = variantSelects[currentOptionIndex];
            const availableValues = new Set();
            
            // The constraint selection is the accumulated selections up to the option *before* the current one.
            const constraintSelections = selectedValues.slice(0, currentOptionIndex);

            // Collect all available values for the current option (currentOptionIndex)
            productData.variants.forEach(variant => {
                // Check if the current variant is available AND matches ALL selections made so far 
                // up to the preceding option.
                const matchesConstraints = constraintSelections.every((val, index) => 
                    // Only check constraints that have a value
                    !val || val === variant.options[index]
                );

                if (variant.available && matchesConstraints) {
                    availableValues.add(variant.options[currentOptionIndex]);
                }
            });

            // Re-render/Disable options in the current select
            Array.from(currentSelect.options).forEach(option => {
                if (option.value) { // Skip the 'Select' placeholder option
                    if (availableValues.has(option.value)) {
                        option.disabled = false;
                        option.style.display = "";
                    } else {
                        option.disabled = true;
                        option.style.display = "none";
                    }
                }
            });
            
            // Check if the currently selected value is now disabled. If so, reset it 
            // and trigger a chain reaction reset/filter.
            const currentSelectedValue = currentSelect.value;
            const selectedOption = currentSelect.querySelector(`option[value="${currentSelectedValue}"]`);

            if (currentSelectedValue && selectedOption && selectedOption.disabled) {
                 currentSelect.value = ""; // Reset value
                 selectedValues[currentOptionIndex] = ""; // Reset in array
                 
                 // Restart the filtering chain from this point
                 filterOptions(currentOptionIndex);
                 return; // Stop current loop execution
            }
        }
    }

    function onOptionChange(index, value) {
        selectedValues[index] = value || "";
        var fromLabel = root.querySelector(".from-label");
        
        // 1. Filter options for subsequent dropdowns, starting from the one after the change
        filterOptions(index + 1); 

        // 2. Check for fully selected combination
        if (allSelected()) {
            var matched = findVariantBySelected(selectedValues);
            
            if (matched) {
                applyVariant(matched);
            } else {
                // This state should rarely be hit if filtering works perfectly, 
                // but if an unavailable variant slipped through, treat it as sold out.
                addBtn.disabled = true;
                addBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", "true");
                addBtn.textContent = "Sold out"; 
                oosEl.style.display = "block";
            }
        } else {
            // Not all options are selected
            addBtn.disabled = true;
            addBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", "true");
            addBtn.textContent = "Please select options";
            oosEl.style.display = "none";
            
            // Reset price display to min/range state
            if (productData.variants.length > 1 && productData.price_min != productData.price_max) {
                if (fromLabel) fromLabel.style.display = "inline-block";
                priceEl.textContent = formatMoney(productData.price_min);
                compareEl.style.display = "none";
            }
        }
    }

    variantSelects.forEach(function (select, idx) {
        // Ensure initial state is the placeholder
        select.value = ""; 
        select.addEventListener("change", function (e) {
            onOptionChange(idx, e.target.value);
        });
    });
    
    // Initial call to set up filtering after page load, starting from the first option (index 0)
    // This handles cases where some options in the first dropdown might be universally unavailable.
    filterOptions(0);


    // Quantity buttons
    root.querySelector(".qty-btn.plus").addEventListener("click", function () {
        qtyInput.value = parseInt(qtyInput.value || 1) + 1;
    });

    root.querySelector(".qty-btn.minus").addEventListener("click", function () {
        qtyInput.value = Math.max(1, parseInt(qtyInput.value || 1) - 1);
    });
});
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    if (window.innerWidth >= 768) return; // only mobile

    const descriptionBlocks = document.querySelectorAll(".description-columns");

    descriptionBlocks.forEach(function (block) {
        const colRight = block.querySelector(".col-right");

        // Check if col-right exists and has meaningful children
        if (!colRight) return;
        if (colRight.children.length === 0) return;
        if (colRight.textContent.trim() === "") return;

        // Hide initially
        colRight.classList.add("is-hidden");

        // Create Read More wrapper
        const readMoreWrapper = document.createElement("div");
        readMoreWrapper.className = "description-readmore";

        const button = document.createElement("button");
        button.type = "button";
        button.textContent = "Read More";
        button.className = "btn btn-main";

        readMoreWrapper.appendChild(button);

        // Insert after col-left
        const colLeft = block.querySelector(".col-left");
        colLeft.after(readMoreWrapper);

        // Click event
        button.addEventListener("click", function () {
        colRight.classList.remove("is-hidden");
        button.disabled = true;
        button.textContent = "Expanded";
        });
    });
});
</script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        var root = document.getElementById('section-template--25683672301939__product_gallery_CyMdCp');
        if (!root) return;

        var track = root.querySelector('#gallery-track-template--25683672301939__product_gallery_CyMdCp');
        if (window.innerWidth <= 900) {

  const slides = Array.from(track.children);
  const cloneCount = slides.length;

  /* clone slides to start */
  slides.forEach(slide => {
    const clone = slide.cloneNode(true);
    clone.classList.add("clone");
    track.appendChild(clone);
  });

  /* clone slides to end */
  slides.slice().reverse().forEach(slide => {
    const clone = slide.cloneNode(true);
    clone.classList.add("clone");
    track.insertBefore(clone, track.firstChild);
  });

  /* start in middle */
  const slideWidth = track.children[cloneCount].offsetWidth + 12;
  track.scrollLeft = slideWidth * cloneCount;

  track.addEventListener("scroll", function () {

    const maxScroll = slideWidth * (cloneCount * 2);

    if (track.scrollLeft <= slideWidth) {
      track.scrollLeft = slideWidth * (cloneCount + slides.length - 1);
    }

    if (track.scrollLeft >= maxScroll) {
      track.scrollLeft = slideWidth * cloneCount;
    }

  });

}
        var prevBtn = root.querySelector('.gallery-arrow--prev');
        var nextBtn = root.querySelector('.gallery-arrow--next');

        /* Arrow scroll — page-like but momentum-friendly */
        function scrollByPage(dir) {

            const slide = track.querySelector('.gallery-slide');
            if (!slide) return;

            const gap = parseInt(getComputedStyle(track).gap) || 0;
            const slideWidth = slide.offsetWidth + gap;

            const delta = slideWidth * (dir === 'next' ? 1 : -1);

            track.scrollBy({
                left: delta,
                behavior: 'smooth'
            });

        }

        prevBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            scrollByPage('prev');
        });

        nextBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            scrollByPage('next');
        });

        /* 🔽 ARROW VISIBILITY LOGIC (ADDED) 🔽 */
        function updateArrowVisibility() {
            var maxScrollLeft = track.scrollWidth - track.clientWidth;

            if (track.scrollWidth <= track.clientWidth + 2) {
                prevBtn.style.display = 'none';
                nextBtn.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            prevBtn.style.display = track.scrollLeft <= 2 ? 'none' : 'inline-flex';
            nextBtn.style.display =
                track.scrollLeft >= maxScrollLeft - 2 ? 'none' : 'inline-flex';
        }

        updateArrowVisibility();
        track.addEventListener('scroll', updateArrowVisibility);
        window.addEventListener('resize', updateArrowVisibility);
        /* 🔼 ARROW VISIBILITY LOGIC (ADDED) 🔼 */

        /* --- Swipe/drag on TRACK (mobile native; desktop drag) --- */
        (function enableDragScroll(el) {
            var isDown = false,
                startX = 0,
                scrollLeft = 0;
            var lastX = 0,
                lastT = 0,
                velocity = 0;

            function onDown(e) {
                isDown = true;
                el.classList.add('is-dragging');
                startX = e.touches ? e.touches[0].pageX : e.pageX;
                scrollLeft = el.scrollLeft;
                lastX = startX;
                lastT = performance.now();
                velocity = 0;
            }

            function onMove(e) {
                if (!isDown) return;
                var x = e.touches ? e.touches[0].pageX : e.pageX;
                var dx = x - startX;
                el.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - dx;

                var now = performance.now();
                var dt = now - lastT;
                if (dt > 0) {
                    velocity = (x - lastX) / dt;
                    lastX = x;
                    lastT = now;
                }

                e.preventDefault();
            }

            function onUp() {
                if (!isDown) return;
                isDown = false;
                el.classList.remove('is-dragging');

                var momentum = velocity * 600;
                if (Math.abs(momentum) > 10) {
                    el.scrollBy({ left: -momentum, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }

                updateArrowVisibility();
            }

            el.addEventListener('mousedown', onDown);
            el.addEventListener('touchstart', onDown, { passive: true });
            window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove, { passive: false });
            window.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove, { passive: false });
            window.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
            window.addEventListener('touchend', onUp);
            window.addEventListener('touchcancel', onUp);
        })(track);

        /* --- Modal logic + swipe inside modal (UNCHANGED) --- */
        var modal = ensureModal();
        var modalImg = modal.querySelector('.gallery-modal__img');
        var closeEls = modal.querySelectorAll('[data-close]');
        var navPrev = modal.querySelector('.gallery-modal__nav--prev');
        var navNext = modal.querySelector('.gallery-modal__nav--next');

        var slides = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.gallery-slide .gallery-zoom'));
        var current = -1;

        function openAt(index) {
            if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;
            current = index;
            var a = slides[current];
            modalImg.src = a.getAttribute('data-full');
            modalImg.alt = a.getAttribute('data-alt') || '';
            modal.classList.add('is-open');
            modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
            document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        }

        function closeModal() {
            modal.classList.remove('is-open');
            modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
            document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';
            modalImg.removeAttribute('src');
        }

        function next() {
            openAt((current + 1) % slides.length);
        }

        function prev() {
            openAt((current - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length);
        }

        slides.forEach(function (a, idx) {
            a.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                openAt(idx);
            });
        });

        closeEls.forEach(function (el) {
            el.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
        });

        navNext.addEventListener('click', next);
        navPrev.addEventListener('click', prev);

        document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
            if (!modal.classList.contains('is-open')) return;
            if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal();
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') next();
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') prev();
        });

        modalImg.addEventListener('click', next);
    });

    function ensureModal() {
        var existing = document.getElementById('gallery-modal-global');
        if (existing) return existing;

        var modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.id = 'gallery-modal-global';
        modal.className = 'gallery-modal';
        modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        modal.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div class="gallery-modal__backdrop" data-close></div>
            <button class="gallery-modal__close" type="button" aria-label="Close" data-close>✕</button>
            <button class="gallery-modal__nav gallery-modal__nav--prev" type="button">‹</button>
            <img class="gallery-modal__img" alt="" />
            <button class="gallery-modal__nav gallery-modal__nav--next" type="button">›</button>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(modal);
        return modal;
    }
</script>

<script>
    (function(){
        function initFAQSection() {

            var root = document.getElementById('section-template--25683672301939__product_faq_3dkBQQ');
            if (!root) return;

            /* ----------------------------
            Accordion Toggle
            ---------------------------- */

            var toggles = root.querySelectorAll('.faq-toggle');

            toggles.forEach(function(toggle) {

                var contentId = toggle.getAttribute('aria-controls');
                var content = root.querySelector('#' + contentId);
                if (!content) return;

                content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

                toggle.addEventListener('click', function () {

                    var expanded = toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';

                    if (!expanded) {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                        content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px';
                        content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
                    } else {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                        content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                        content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                    }

                });

            });


            /* ----------------------------
            Mobile Expand Toggle
            ---------------------------- */

            if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {

                var btn = root.querySelector('.faq-expand-btn');
                var faqList = root.querySelector('.faq-list');
                var fade = root.querySelector('.faq-fade');
                var collapsedHeight = 400;

                if (!btn || !faqList) return;

                btn.addEventListener('click', function(e){
                    e.preventDefault();

                    var isExpanded = btn.classList.contains("expanded");

                    if (!isExpanded) {

                        faqList.style.maxHeight = "none";
                        faqList.style.overflow = "visible";

                        if (fade) fade.style.opacity = "0";

                        btn.textContent = "Less FAQs";
                        btn.classList.add("expanded");

                    } else {

                        faqList.style.maxHeight = collapsedHeight + "px";
                        faqList.style.overflow = "hidden";

                        if (fade) fade.style.opacity = "1";

                        btn.textContent = "More FAQs";
                        btn.classList.remove("expanded");
                    }

                    btn.blur();

                });

            }

        }

        /* Run immediately */
        initFAQSection();

        /* Re-run when Shopify loads section dynamically */
        document.addEventListener('shopify:section:load', initFAQSection);

    })();
</script>

Unlike waterproof fabrics, there is no waterproof membrane or synthetic backing layer, allowing the cotton to feel more natural against the body and more closely resemble conventional bedding.<br>
<br>
Our cotton fabric is tightly woven to provide effective protection against allergens, dust mites, and bed bugs while still maintaining a lightweight and comfortable sleeping experience.<br>
<br>
Customers who are highly sensitive to fabric texture, heat retention, or material feel often prefer our 100% cotton range for its natural softness and breathability. However, because these products are non-waterproof, they are not designed to protect against spills, stains, moisture, or everyday grime.<br>

<script>

(function(){

    var root = document.getElementById('section-template--25683672301939__product_faq_content_hBhQB7');

    if(!root) return;

    var toggle = root.querySelector('.faq-content-toggle');
    var content = root.querySelector('.faq-content-answer');

    toggle.addEventListener('click', function(){

        var expanded = toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';

        if(!expanded){

            toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
            content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px';
            content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');

        } else {

            toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
            content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

        }

    });

})();

</script>

                            </div>
                        

                        <div class="info-loop-content">
                            
                                <h2 class="info-loop-title">Ensemble Base Or Box Spring Use</h2>
                            
                            
                                <div class="info-loop-desc rte">
                                    <div class="metafield-rich_text_field"><p>The mattress encasement is also suitable for use with an ensemble base or box spring:<br>
<br>
1. Remove the legs or wheels.<br>
2. Slide the encasement over the base and zip it up.<br>
3. Use a sharp knife or scissors to make a small incision where the first leg hole is located.<br>
4. Put the screw/bolt from the leg or wheel through the incision in the encasement and tighten it firmly, sealing the encasement to the base between the leg and the baseboard.<br>
5. Repeat this process for each leg or wheel.<br>
<br>
It is always best to follow the instructions carefully for the optimal functioning of your base, protector or cover.</p></div>
                                </div>
                            
                                                    
                        </div>

                            </div>
                        

                        <div class="info-loop-content">
                            
                                <h2 class="info-loop-title">Enclosed Binding Seams:</h2>
                            
                            
                                <div class="info-loop-desc rte">
                                    <div class="metafield-rich_text_field"><p>An enclosed binding seam is a seam construction method in which the fabric edges are fully sealed within a binding, forming a continuous and impenetrable barrier along the seam line. This technique is critical in mattress, pillow, and quilt encasements intended for allergen, bed bug, and scabies control. Unlike standard seams, enclosed binding seams maintain the barrier properties of the encasement fabric, preventing the passage of microscopic allergens such as dust mite waste, while also eliminating potential entry or escape points for bed bugs and mites. <br>
<br>
Their effectiveness can be validated through standardized testing methods, such as ASTM F3160 for barrier performance against bed bug penetration and allergen filtration tests like ASTM F2100. By ensuring the seam integrity meets or exceeds these benchmarks, enclosed binding seams provide a reliable containment system, preserving the protective function of the encasement in both residential and healthcare environments. </p></div>

                        </div>

                        </span>
                        <h4 class="faq-title">What’s the difference between the cotton and waterproof fabrics? Why would I buy cotton over the 90 gsm polyester jersey?</h4>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-content-11" class="faq-content" role="region" aria-hidden="true" style="max-height: 0;">
                        <div class="faq-content-inner" style="color: #475569;">
                            <div class="metafield-rich_text_field"><ul><li><strong>Cotton Encasements:</strong> Made from tightly woven 100% cotton (approx. 2.8 µm pore size). They’re breathable, natural, OEKO-TEX certified, hypoallergenic, and chemical-free. Cotton is ideal if you prefer natural fibres, maximum airflow, and comfort. It’s not waterproof, so best when liquid protection is not a concern.</li><li><strong>Polyester Jersey Waterproof Encasements (90 gsm):</strong> These use a knitted polyester jersey with a TPU (thermoplastic polyurethane) waterproof membrane. They block liquids, stains, bed bugs, dust mites, and allergens, dirt and grime (just about everything). They’re slightly less breathable than cotton, but softer and stretchier, making them easier to fit your mattresses. </li></ul><p><strong>Summary:</strong>Choose <strong>cotton</strong> if you want natural fibres and breathability.Choose <strong>polyester waterproof</strong> if you need spill and liquid protection.</p></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </li>
            
                <li class="faq-item" style="background: #fbf6f0;">
                    <button type="button" class="faq-toggle" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="faq-content-12">
                        <span class="faq-icon">
                            <img src="https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0946/3447/5891/files/faq-arrow-icon.svg?v=1771404345" class="icon-chevron" alt="faq arrow icon">
                        </span>
                        <h4 class="faq-title">If I am sensitive to VOCs will this be suitable for me?</h4>
                    </button>
                    <div id="faq-content-12" class="faq-content" role="region" aria-hidden="true" style="max-height: 0;">
                        <div class="faq-content-inner" style="color: #475569;">
                            <div class="metafield-rich_text_field"><p>If you are sensitive to volatile organic compounds this product will be suitable for you. We suggest that you wash your product twice prior to use as this will ensure the fabric is free from any contaminants that may have transferred in production of from the product packaging. We have had plenty of highly sensitive customers who have had no issues with our Polyester/TPU lined items once they have been washed. The fabric is inert and does not off gas.</p></div>

<script>
    (function(){
        function initFAQSection() {

            var root = document.getElementById('section-template--25683672301939__product_faq_hE4Xf3');
            if (!root) return;

            /* ----------------------------
            Accordion Toggle
            ---------------------------- */

            var toggles = root.querySelectorAll('.faq-toggle');

            toggles.forEach(function(toggle) {

                var contentId = toggle.getAttribute('aria-controls');
                var content = root.querySelector('#' + contentId);
                if (!content) return;

                content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

                toggle.addEventListener('click', function () {

                    var expanded = toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';

                    if (!expanded) {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
                        content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px';
                        content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
                    } else {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                        content.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                        content.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                    }

                });

            });


            /* ----------------------------
            Mobile Expand Toggle
            ---------------------------- */

            if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {

                var btn = root.querySelector('.faq-expand-btn');
                var faqList = root.querySelector('.faq-list');
                var fade = root.querySelector('.faq-fade');
                var collapsedHeight = 400;

                if (!btn || !faqList) return;

                btn.addEventListener('click', function(e){
                    e.preventDefault();

                    var isExpanded = btn.classList.contains("expanded");

                    if (!isExpanded) {

                        faqList.style.maxHeight = "none";
                        faqList.style.overflow = "visible";

                        if (fade) fade.style.opacity = "0";

                        btn.textContent = "Less FAQs";
                        btn.classList.add("expanded");

                    } else {

                        faqList.style.maxHeight = collapsedHeight + "px";
                        faqList.style.overflow = "hidden";

                        if (fade) fade.style.opacity = "1";

                        btn.textContent = "More FAQs";
                        btn.classList.remove("expanded");
                    }

                    btn.blur();

                });

            }

        }

        /* Run immediately */
        initFAQSection();

        /* Re-run when Shopify loads section dynamically */
        document.addEventListener('shopify:section:load', initFAQSection);

    })();
</script>

                        <button class="combo-tab-btn active" data-tab-btn="mattress" type="button">Mattress</button>
                     
                        <button class="combo-tab-btn" data-tab-btn="pillow" type="button">Pillow</button>
                     
                        <button class="combo-tab-btn" data-tab-btn="quilt" type="button">Quilt</button>
                    
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="combo-footer-right">
                <div class="totals">
                    <div class="tot-row"><span>Subtotal</span><strong data-subtotal="">₹0.00</strong></div>
                    <div class="tot-row" data-discount-row="" hidden=""><span>You saved 10%</span><strong data-saved="">-₹0.00</strong></div>
                    <div class="tot-row tot-row--grand"><span>Total</span><strong data-grand="">₹0.00</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="bundle-final-action">
            <button class="btn-final-add" data-add-bundle="" disabled="">Add Bundle to Cart</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <style>
        div#shopify-section-template--25683672301939__product_bundle_modal_mG9mQ9 {
            z-index: 99;
        }
        #combo-title{margin: 0;}
        .combo-overlay[hidden], .combo-modal[hidden]{display:none;}
        .combo-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);z-index:9997;display: block;}
        .combo-modal{position:fixed;z-index:9998;inset:0;margin:auto;max-width:1200px;width:calc(100% - 32px);top:40px;background:#F7F1E7;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
        .combo-modal__head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:15px;}
        .combo-help{color:#6b5d4a;font-size:14px;}
        .combo-tabs{display:flex;gap:10px;}
        .combo-tab-btn{flex:1;background:#efe7dd;border:1px solid #d8cbb9;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
        .combo-tab-btn.active{background:#fff;border-color:#b8a388;}
        .combo-tab-panel{padding:12px 22px;}
        .combo-list{display:grid;gap:16px;}
        .combo-item{display:flex;gap:16px;background:#fff;padding:12px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #efe3d1;align-items:center;}
        .ci-img{width:80px;height:80px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:12px;}
        .ci-mid{flex:1;}
        .ci-title{margin:0;font-size:18px;}
        .ci-price{font-weight:700;margin:6px 0;}
        .ci-desc{font-size:13px;margin:0;color:#6b5d4a;}
        .ci-opts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;}
        .ci-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;}
        .btn-add{background:#4b1d85;color:#fff;border:0;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:999px;}
        .btn-add[disabled]{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed;}
        .btn-view{background:#eee;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;text-decoration:none;color:#3a2e1f;}
        .combo-footer {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin: 0 18px;
            border: 1px solid #f2e8d8;
            align-items: center;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 15px;

            .combo-footer-left{
                width: 98%;
            }
        }
        .picked{display:flex;gap:10px;overflow-x:auto;min-height:84px;}
        .picked-card{display:flex;gap:12px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e6dccc;padding:10px;border-radius:16px;align-items:center; width: 33%;}
        .picked-thumb{width:68px;height:68px;border-radius:12px;object-fit:cover;}
        .picked-title{margin:0;font-size:14px;}
        .picked-price{font-weight:700;font-size:13px;}
        .picked-remove{background:#7a1b1b;color:#fff;border:0;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;cursor:pointer;margin-left:8px;}
        .bundle-final-action{padding:16px;background:#fff7e9;text-align:center;}
        .btn-final-add{background:#4d1fa0;color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:999px;font-size:16px;border:none;}
        .btn-final-add:disabled{opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed;}
        .totals{min-width:260px;}
        .tot-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;}
        .tot-row--grand strong{font-size:18px;}
    </style>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const root = document.getElementById('combo-bundle-root');
        const modal = root.querySelector('.combo-modal');
        const overlay = root.querySelector('[data-overlay]');
        const tabBtns = root.querySelectorAll('[data-tab-btn]');
        const tabPanels = root.querySelectorAll('[data-tab-panel]');
        const pickedWrap = root.querySelector('[data-picked]');
        const subtotalEl = root.querySelector('[data-subtotal]');
        const savedRow = root.querySelector('[data-discount-row]');
        const savedEl = root.querySelector('[data-saved]');
        const grandEl = root.querySelector('[data-grand]');
        const addBundleBtn = root.querySelector('[data-add-bundle]');

        const DISCOUNT_RATE = 0.10;
        const REQUIRED = ['mattress','pillow','quilt'];

        // Virtual bundle product references (must exist)
        const bundleVariantId = null;
        const bundleProductTitle = "";

        const fmt = cents => {
        try { return (new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, { style:'currency', currency: "AUD" })).format(cents/100); }
        catch(e){ return '₹' + (cents/100).toFixed(2); }
        };

        // Persistent reservedMap (one per group). Keeps state during modal lifetime.
        // Structure: { mattress: { product_id, variant_id, product_title, price, image, cart_line_key }, ... }
        const reservedMap = { mattress: null, pillow: null, quilt: null };

        // TAB SWITCH
        function switchTab(g) {
        tabBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.tabBtn === g));
        tabPanels.forEach(p => p.hidden = (p.dataset.tabPanel !== g));
        }
        tabBtns.forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', () => switchTab(b.dataset.tabBtn)));

        // OPEN MODAL (prevent link default)
        document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        const opener = e.target.closest('[data-open-combo-modal]');
        if (opener) {
            e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
            overlay.hidden = false; modal.hidden = false;
            switchTab('mattress');
            // Reserve lowest per group when opened
            syncAndEnforceOnOpen();
        }
        });

        // CLOSE
        root.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        if (e.target.matches('[data-close]') || e.target === overlay) {
            overlay.hidden = true; modal.hidden = true;
        }
        });

        // Helpers
        function findCard(prodId) {
        return root.querySelector(`[data-product-id='${prodId}']`);
        }

        // Build lowest item per group from cart snapshot
        function lowestPerGroupFromCart(cart) {
        const map = {};
        cart.items.forEach(item => {
            const card = findCard(item.product_id);
            if (!card) return;
            const group = card.dataset.group;
            if (!group) return;
            if (!map[group] || item.price < map[group].price) map[group] = item;
        });
        return map;
        }

        // RESERVE ON OPEN: compute lowest for each group and reduce qty by 1 (only for those groups)
        async function syncAndEnforceOnOpen() {
        let cart = await fetch('/cart.js').then(r=>r.json());

        // determine lowest per group in current cart
        const lowest = lowestPerGroupFromCart(cart);
        const actions = [];

        for (const group of REQUIRED) {
            const item = lowest[group];
            if (item) {
            // If we haven't already reserved this exact product for this group, reserve it
            // (prevents re-reserving same line repeatedly)
            if (reservedMap[group] && reservedMap[group].product_id === item.product_id) {
                // already reserved previously; skip
                continue;
            }

            // If quantity > 0, we will reduce by 1 (reserve 1)
            if (item.quantity >= 1) {
                // New quantity after reserve
                const newQty = Math.max(0, item.quantity - 1);
                actions.push(fetch('/cart/change.js', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
                body: JSON.stringify({ id: item.key, quantity: newQty })
                }).then(()=> {
                // after change, we will set reservedMap[group] from item snapshot
                reservedMap[group] = {
                    product_id: item.product_id,
                    variant_id: item.variant_id,
                    product_title: item.product_title,
                    price: item.price,
                    image: item.image,
                    cart_line_key: item.key
                };
                }));
            }
            }
        }

        if (actions.length > 0) {
            await Promise.all(actions);
            // re-fetch cart after all changes
            cart = await fetch('/cart.js').then(r=>r.json());
        } else {
            // if nothing changed, still set reservedMap from lowest where not already set
            for (const g of REQUIRED) {
            if (!reservedMap[g] && lowest[g]) {
                const it = lowest[g];
                // record reserved as 1 taken from this line
                reservedMap[g] = {
                product_id: it.product_id,
                variant_id: it.variant_id,
                product_title: it.product_title,
                price: it.price,
                image: it.image,
                cart_line_key: it.key
                };
            }
            }
        }

        // Apply UI once reservedMap is populated
        applyReservedToUI();
        rebuildPickedFromReserved();
        }

        // APPLY reservedMap to UI (disable/enable buttons per group)
        function applyReservedToUI() {
        root.querySelectorAll('[data-product]').forEach(card => {
            const pid = Number(card.dataset.productId);
            const group = card.dataset.group;
            const btn = card.querySelector('[data-add]');
            const reserved = reservedMap[group];

            if (reserved) {
            if (reserved.product_id === pid) {
                btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Added';
                card.classList.add('disabled');
            } else {
                btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Filled';
                card.classList.remove('disabled');
            }
            } else {
            btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Add';
            card.classList.remove('disabled');
            }
        });
        }

        // Rebuild picked area from reservedMap (preserve order)
        function rebuildPickedFromReserved() {
        pickedWrap.innerHTML = '';
        REQUIRED.forEach(group => {
            const item = reservedMap[group];
            if (!item) return;
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'picked-card';
            div.dataset.pickedCard = '';
            div.dataset.group = group;
            div.dataset.productId = item.product_id;
            div.dataset.variantId = item.variant_id;
            div.dataset.price = item.price;
            div.innerHTML = `
            <img class="picked-thumb" src="${item.image || ''}" alt="">
            <div>
                <p class="picked-title">${item.product_title}</p>
                <div class="picked-price">${fmt(item.price)}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="picked-remove" data-remove="${item.product_id}" aria-label="Remove reserved">✕</button>
            `;
            pickedWrap.appendChild(div);
        });

        computeTotals();
        updateAddBundleButton();
        updateTabButtonsFromPicked();
        }

        // Compute totals from reservedMap
        function computeTotals() {
        const prices = REQUIRED.map(g => reservedMap[g]?.price || 0);
        const subtotal = prices.reduce((s,n)=>s + Number(n || 0), 0);
        const full = REQUIRED.every(g => reservedMap[g]);
        const saving = full ? Math.round(subtotal * DISCOUNT_RATE) : 0;
        const total = subtotal - saving;

        subtotalEl.textContent = fmt(subtotal);
        savedEl.textContent = '-' + fmt(saving);
        grandEl.textContent = fmt(total);
        savedRow.hidden = !full;
        }

        function updateAddBundleButton() {
        const ready = REQUIRED.every(g => reservedMap[g]);
        addBundleBtn.disabled = !ready;
        }

        function updateTabButtonsFromPicked() {
        const pickedGroups = new Set(Object.keys(reservedMap).filter(k => reservedMap[k]));
        tabBtns.forEach(btn => {
            const grp = btn.dataset.tabBtn;
            btn.classList.toggle('filled', pickedGroups.has(grp));
        });
        }

        // Add individual product (from list) — only reserves that group and does not clear other groups
        root.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-add]');
        if (!btn) return;
        const card = btn.closest('[data-product]');
        const variantEl = card.querySelector('[data-variant]');
        const variantId = variantEl ? (variantEl.value || variantEl.getAttribute('value')) : null;
        if (!variantId) return;

        const group = card.dataset.group;

        btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Adding...';

        // 1) add item to cart
        await fetch('/cart/add.js', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
            body: JSON.stringify({ items: [{ id: Number(variantId), quantity: 1 }] })
        });

        // 2) After adding, find the lowest for this group and reserve exactly 1 from it
        const cart = await fetch('/cart.js').then(r=>r.json());
        // find cheapest item in cart for this group
        const groupItems = cart.items.filter(i => {
            const c = findCard(i.product_id);
            return c && c.dataset.group === group;
        });
        if (groupItems.length === 0) {
            // nothing to reserve
            await syncAndEnforceOnOpen(); // safe fallback
            return;
        }
        // pick cheapest in this group
        let cheapest = groupItems[0];
        groupItems.forEach(it => { if (it.price < cheapest.price) cheapest = it; });

        // If we already have a reserved item for this group and it's the same product_id -> do nothing
        if (reservedMap[group] && reservedMap[group].product_id === cheapest.product_id) {
            // already reserved for this group
            await syncAndEnforceOnOpen(); // reapply UI
            return;
        }

        // reduce quantity of that cheapest cart line by 1 (reserve 1)
        if (cheapest.quantity >= 1) {
            const newQty = Math.max(0, cheapest.quantity - 1);
            await fetch('/cart/change.js', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
            body: JSON.stringify({ id: cheapest.key, quantity: newQty })
            });

            // set reserved map for this group
            reservedMap[group] = {
            product_id: cheapest.product_id,
            variant_id: cheapest.variant_id,
            product_title: cheapest.product_title,
            price: cheapest.price,
            image: cheapest.image,
            cart_line_key: cheapest.key
            };
        }

        // Refresh UI
        applyReservedToUI();
        rebuildPickedFromReserved();
        });

        // Remove reserved (restore 1 qty to cart) for that group
        pickedWrap.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
        const btn = e.target.closest('[data-remove]');
        if (!btn) return;
        const prodId = Number(btn.dataset.remove);

        // find which group in reservedMap matches this product_id
        const group = Object.keys(reservedMap).find(k => reservedMap[k] && reservedMap[k].product_id === prodId);
        if (!group) return;

        const reservedItem = reservedMap[group];
        // Add back one unit to cart (use variant id)
        const variantToAdd = reservedItem.variant_id;
        if (variantToAdd) {
            await fetch('/cart/add.js', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
            body: JSON.stringify({ items: [{ id: Number(variantToAdd), quantity: 1 }] })
            });
        } else {
            // try to infer variant from cart snapshot
            const cartNow = await fetch('/cart.js').then(r=>r.json());
            const found = cartNow.items.find(i => i.product_id === prodId);
            if (found) {
            // add same variant
            await fetch('/cart/add.js', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
                body: JSON.stringify({ items: [{ id: found.variant_id, quantity: 1 }] })
            });
            }
        }

        // clear reserved map for this group
        reservedMap[group] = null;

        // Re-run reserve enforcement to ensure other groups still reserved as needed (but we won't overwrite others)
        await syncAndEnforceOnOpen();
        });

        // Add Bundle to Cart: remove reserved items and add single virtual bundle product with properties.bundle_price
        addBundleBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        addBundleBtn.disabled = true;
        addBundleBtn.textContent = 'Adding Bundle...';

        // Ensure all groups are reserved
        const missing = REQUIRED.filter(g => !reservedMap[g]);
        if (missing.length) {
            alert('Please add one item from each group before adding the bundle.');
            addBundleBtn.disabled = false;
            addBundleBtn.textContent = 'Add Bundle to Cart';
            return;
        }

        // Remove reserved cart lines (they were previously reduced by 1 to reserve, but there may still be residual lines for same product)
        const cartNow = await fetch('/cart.js').then(r => r.json());
        // For each reserved product_id remove all lines for that product_id (we want to remove the reserved 1 as the bundle will represent it)
        for (const g of REQUIRED) {
            const pid = reservedMap[g].product_id;
            const lines = cartNow.items.filter(i => i.product_id === pid);
            for (const line of lines) {
            // remove entire line (quantity 0)
            await fetch('/cart/change.js', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
                body: JSON.stringify({ id: line.key, quantity: 0 })
            });
            }
        }

        // compute subtotal price (sum reserved prices) and finalPrice after discount
        const subtotal = REQUIRED.reduce((s,g) => s + Number(reservedMap[g].price || 0), 0);
        const discount = Math.round(subtotal * DISCOUNT_RATE);
        const finalPrice = subtotal - discount; // in cents

        // Add virtual bundle product with properties storing details & bundle_price
        const properties = {
            bundle: 'yes',
            bundle_title: bundleProductTitle || 'Custom Bundle',
            mattress: reservedMap['mattress'].product_title,
            pillow: reservedMap['pillow'].product_title,
            quilt: reservedMap['quilt'].product_title,
            bundle_price: String(finalPrice), // store cents as string
            _set_price: finalPrice
        };

        await fetch('/cart/add.js', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
            body: JSON.stringify({
            items: [{
                id: Number(bundleVariantId),
                quantity: 1,
                properties: properties
            }]
            })
        });

        // Redirect to cart to show grouped bundle
        window.location.href = '/cart';
        });

        // Initialize default tab
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        if (tabBtns.length) switchTab(tabBtns[0].dataset.tabBtn || 'mattress');
        });

    })();
    </script>

  
</section>
